MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court will award $825 in attorney fees and $510 for costs of this proceeding (these items having been left blank on proposed order). ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J.
